'''dongazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:roached|roached]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roached|roached]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dongazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongazithi|dongazithi]] || [[word:dongaziji|dongaziji]] || [[word:dongazishi|dongazishi]] || [[word:dongaziki|dongaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongazuthuthu|dongazuthuthu]] || [[word:dongazujuju|dongazujuju]] || [[word:dongazushushu|dongazushushu]] || [[word:dongazukuku|dongazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongazuthu|dongazuthu]] || [[word:dongazuju|dongazuju]] || [[word:dongazushu|dongazushu]] || [[word:dongazuku|dongazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongazufthuf|dongazufthuf]] || [[word:dongazufjuf|dongazufjuf]] || [[word:dongazufshuf|dongazufshuf]] || [[word:dongazufkuf|dongazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongazethe|dongazethe]] || [[word:dongazeje|dongazeje]] || [[word:dongazeshe|dongazeshe]] || [[word:dongazeke|dongazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongazothotho|dongazothotho]] || [[word:dongazojojo|dongazojojo]] || [[word:dongazoshosho|dongazoshosho]] || [[word:dongazokoko|dongazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongazotho|dongazotho]] || [[word:dongazojo|dongazojo]] || [[word:dongazosho|dongazosho]] || [[word:dongazoko|dongazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongazofthof|dongazofthof]] || [[word:dongazofjof|dongazofjof]] || [[word:dongazofshof|dongazofshof]] || [[word:dongazofkof|dongazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongazïfthïf|dongazïfthïf]] || [[word:dongazïfjïf|dongazïfjïf]] || [[word:dongazïfshïf|dongazïfshïf]] || [[word:dongazïfkïf|dongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongazïfthïfthïf|dongazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dongazïfjïfjïf|dongazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dongazïfshïfshïf|dongazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dongazïfkïfkïf|dongazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongazïfthïf|dongazïfthïf]] || [[word:dongazïfjïf|dongazïfjïf]] || [[word:dongazïfshïf|dongazïfshïf]] || [[word:dongazïfkïf|dongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongazïfthïf|dongazïfthïf]] || [[word:dongazïfjïf|dongazïfjïf]] || [[word:dongazïfshïf|dongazïfshïf]] || [[word:dongazïfkïf|dongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongazæthæ|dongazæthæ]] || [[word:dongazæjæ|dongazæjæ]] || [[word:dongazæshæ|dongazæshæ]] || [[word:dongazækæ|dongazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongazathatha|dongazathatha]] || [[word:dongazajaja|dongazajaja]] || [[word:dongazashasha|dongazashasha]] || [[word:dongazakaka|dongazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongazatha|dongazatha]] || [[word:dongazaja|dongazaja]] || [[word:dongazasha|dongazasha]] || [[word:dongazaka|dongazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongazafthaf|dongazafthaf]] || [[word:dongazafjaf|dongazafjaf]] || [[word:dongazafshaf|dongazafshaf]] || [[word:dongazafkaf|dongazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dongazasha|dongazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongazshësha|dongazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongazrosha|dongazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongazmusha|dongazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongazyasha|dongazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongaznkshësha|godongaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongaznkrosha|godongaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongaznkmusha|godongaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongaznkyasha|godongaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dongangazasha|dongangazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongangazshësha|dongangazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongangazrosha|dongangazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongangazmusha|dongangazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongangazyasha|dongangazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongangaznkshësha|godongangaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongangaznkrosha|godongangaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongangaznkmusha|godongangaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongangaznkyasha|godongangaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dengæzasha|dengæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dengæzshësha|dengæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dengæzrosha|dengæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dengæzmusha|dengæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dengæzyasha|dengæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godengæznkshësha|godengæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godengæznkrosha|godengæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godengæznkmusha|godengæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godengæznkyasha|godengæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dongfazasha|dongfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongfazshësha|dongfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongfazrosha|dongfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongfazmusha|dongfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongfazyasha|dongfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongfaznkshësha|godongfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongfaznkrosha|godongfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongfaznkmusha|godongfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongfaznkyasha|godongfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
